mapper.select: SELECT userRoleCode, userId, userEmail, userName, userBirth, userGender, userPhone, userAddr1, userAddr2 FROM user WHERE userId = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET userName = #{userName}, userEmail = #{userEmail}, userPhone = #{userPhone}, userAddr1 = #{userAddr1}, userAddr2 = #{userAddr2}, updatedAt = NOW() WHERE userId = #{userId}
UPDATE user SET userPassword = #{newPassword}, updatedAt = NOW() WHERE userId = #{userId}
